/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/thermo_host.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/thermo_host.dir/src/thermo_host_main.cpp.o -o thermo_host  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/share/dotnet/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Host.linux-x64/10.0.5/runtimes/linux-x64/native: libopenms_thermo_bridge.a /usr/share/dotnet/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Host.linux-x64/10.0.5/runtimes/linux-x64/native/libnethost.so -ldl
